case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. TIANA SHAW et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $18.66 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY SATISFIED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION ONLY WITH ACCRUED COST OF $85.00. AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, TIANA

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT TIANA SHAW'S MOTION TO SEAL RECORDS AND REGISTER OF ACTIONS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT DOES NOT MEET THE STANDARD FOR SEALING SUCH ACTIONS SET OUT IN CCP 1161.2 NOR DOES SHE SATISFY THE REQUIREMENTS OF CRC 2.550, EVEN IF THAT PROVISION ALLOWED FOR SEALING RECORDS OF CONCLUDED ACTIONS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn, Mtn In Support Of Mtn To Seal Records And Register Of Actions
Off Calendar Jun-18-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT TIANA SHAW'S Motion To Seal Records And Register Of Actions is DENIED. DEFENDANT DOES NOT MEET THE STANDARD FOR SEALING SUCH ACTIONS SET OUT IN CCP SECTION 1161.2 NOR DOES SHE SATISFY THE REQUIREMENTS OF CRC SECTION 2.550, EVEN IF THAT PROVISION ALLOWED FOR SEALING RECORDS OF CONCLUDED ACTIONS. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/AL)
